detaileddescription.para: Block until the button is pressed (debounced).
Block until the button is released.

parameterdescription.para: The button that generated the event.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Button *btn, SYN_GPIO_Pin pin, SYN_ButtonPolarity polarity, uint16_t debounce_ms)
memberdef.name: syn_button_init

parameterdescription.para: Time the button must be held before firing (ms).

detaileddescription.para: Fires repeatedly while the button is held, after the initial press.

briefdescription.para: Update a single button's state machine.

detaileddescription.para: Call this from your main loop, a scheduler task, or a timer callback. Reads the GPIO, runs debouncing, and fires callbacks as needed.

briefdescription.para: How long has the button been in its current state (ms)?
Read and clear pending events (bitmask of SYN_BUTTON_EVT_*).

detaileddescription.para: Useful for polling instead of callbacks.

simplesect.para: Bitmask of events that occurred since last poll.

detaileddescription.para: Pure polling — no interrupts required. Call syn_button_update() (or syn_button_service() for an array) from your main loop or a scheduler task. The module handles debouncing, edge detection, and long-press timing internally.
